parameters.jsCode:
const jobData = $input.item.json;
const safe = (val) => (val == null ? '' : String(val));

async function callOllama(prompt) {
  for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= 3; attempt++) {
    try {
      const resp = await $helpers.httpRequest({
        method: 'POST',
        url: 'http://ollama:11434/api/generate',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: { model: 'llama3.2', prompt: prompt, stream: false },
      });
      return (resp && resp.response) ? resp.response : '[No response]';
    } catch (e) {
      if (attempt === 3) return '[Ollama Error: ' + e.message + ']';
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
    }
  }
}

// CHANGE #5: Senior Architect resume prompt (exact text, string concatenation only)
const resumePrompt =
  'You are a Senior Software Architect and Technical Hiring Manager with 15+ years in the Israeli high-tech industry ' +
  '(Google, Palo Alto Networks, Wix, SailPoint, and high-growth unicorns). ' +
  'You have zero tolerance for messy code and "student-style" habits. You\'ve reviewed thousands of CVs.\n\n' +
  'Your Task - Transform Resume into Production-Grade Portfolio:\n\n' +
  '1. The "Why" Analysis: For each project/skill, explain the PROFESSIONAL REASONING:\n' +
  '   - Why did I choose this specific architecture/language/library?\n' +
  '   - What business problem did it solve?\n' +
  '   - What trade-offs did I consider?\n\n' +
  '2. The \'Brutal\' Truth Assessment:\n' +
  '   - First impression: Does this look like a \'generic student\' or a \'high-potential engineer\'?\n' +
  '   - Be direct, professional, and witty - like a mentor who wants success but won\'t sugarcoat\n' +
  '   - Specific feedback on what screams "junior" vs. what screams "senior"\n\n' +
  '3. Identify & Remove Fluff:\n' +
  '   - What sections/achievements don\'t belong on a Senior Engineer\'s resume?\n' +
  '   - What\'s weak or generic?\n' +
  '   - What should stay because it\'s impressive?\n\n' +
  '4. Tech Stack Reframing (Student -> Senior):\n' +
  '   - Instead of: "Built a todo app with React"\n' +
  '   - Reframe as: "Architected a real-time collaborative task management system with optimistic updates, ' +
  'Redux state management, TypeScript strict mode, and implemented custom hooks for reusable state logic"\n' +
  '   - For EACH project: provide a "before/after" reframing\n\n' +
  '5. ATS & AI Scanner Optimization - CRITICAL:\n' +
  '   - This CV will be scanned by automated AI systems (like those used by Israeli tech companies)\n' +
  '   - Flag EVERY missing keyword that\'s critical for the market:\n' +
  '     * Cloud platforms: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud Run, Firestore), Azure\n' +
  '     * Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), Helm\n' +
  '     * CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI\n' +
  '     * Architecture: Microservices, distributed systems, system design, scalability, load balancing\n' +
  '     * Databases: SQL optimization, NoSQL, caching (Redis), database design\n' +
  '     * Testing: Unit tests (Jest, Vitest), Integration tests, E2E tests (Cypress, Playwright), Test coverage\n' +
  '     * Code quality: Linting (ESLint), Type safety (TypeScript), Code reviews, SOLID principles\n' +
  '     * Monitoring: Observability, logging (ELK stack, Datadog), performance monitoring\n' +
  '     * DevOps: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), monitoring, logging\n' +
  '   - For EACH missing keyword: suggest where/how to add it naturally without sounding forced\n\n' +
  '6. Gap Identification - Israeli Market 2026:\n' +
  '   - What critical skills/technologies are missing?\n' +
  '   - Which gaps are "must-have" for the market right now?\n' +
  '   - Which are "nice-to-have"?\n' +
  '   - Priority ranking: What would make the BIGGEST difference?\n\n' +
  '7. Production-Grade Signals:\n' +
  '   - Does the CV show evidence of: Scaling systems, Production debugging, Leadership/mentoring, ' +
  'Documentation and knowledge sharing, Contributing to open source, Performance optimization, Security awareness?\n\n' +
  'Output Format:\n' +
  '- Section-by-section analysis with specific recommendations\n' +
  '- "Before/After" examples for reframing\n' +
  '- Numbered priority list of improvements\n' +
  '- Estimated impact of each change on marketability\n\n' +
  'Company: ' + jobData.company_name + '\n' +
  'Job Title: ' + jobData.job_title + '\n' +
  'Job Requirements: ' + jobData.job_requirements + '\n' +
  'User Skills: ' + jobData.user_skills;

const coverLetterPrompt =
  'You are a seasoned recruiter at a top Israeli tech company (Google, Palo Alto, or similar) ' +
  'who loves a good authentic story AND respects technical depth. ' +
  'You\'ve seen hundreds of cover letters - you know what actually gets attention.\n\n' +
  'Your Task:\n' +
  '1. Craft the Story - What\'s MY unique angle? Why do I care about this specific company/problem?\n' +
  '2. Technical Credibility - Include ONE specific technical achievement that PROVES I can deliver\n' +
  '3. Company Understanding - Show knowledge of their recent tech decisions, product direction\n' +
  '4. Professional Tone - Confident but respectful, show enthusiasm without desperation\n' +
  '5. Structure: Hook -> Bridge -> Proof -> Close\n\n' +
  'Output: Complete cover letter draft with annotations explaining strategy for each section.\n\n' +
  'Company: ' + jobData.company_name + '\n' +
  'Job Title: ' + jobData.job_title + '\n' +
  'Job Requirements: ' + jobData.job_requirements;

const resume = await callOllama(resumePrompt);
const coverLetter = await callOllama(coverLetterPrompt);

const metadataContent =
  '# Application: ' + safe(jobData.company_name) + ' - ' + safe(jobData.job_title) + '\n\n' +
  '- Company: ' + safe(jobData.company_name) + '\n' +
  '- Title: ' + safe(jobData.job_title) + '\n' +
  '- Location: ' + safe(jobData.location) + '\n' +
  '- URL: ' + safe(jobData.job_url) + '\n' +
  '- Applied: ' + safe(jobData.applied_date) + '\n' +
  '- Application ID: ' + safe(jobData.application_id) + '\n\n' +
  '## Job Description\n' + safe(jobData.job_description) + '\n\n' +
  '## Requirements\n' + safe(jobData.job_requirements) + '\n';

const resumeContent = '# Resume - ' + safe(jobData.job_title) + ' at ' + safe(jobData.company_name) + '\n\n' + resume;
const coverLetterContent = '# Cover Letter - ' + safe(jobData.company_name) + '\n\n' + coverLetter;

return [{
  json: {
    ...jobData,
    tier1_status: 'complete',
    resume_preview: resume.substring(0, 300),
    metadata_content: metadataContent,
    resume_content: resumeContent,
    cover_letter_content: coverLetterContent
  }
}];

parameters.subject: =ACTION REQUIRED: Review Job Application - {{ $json.company_name }} - {{ $json.job_title }}
parameters.html:
=

🕒 Job Application Ready for Review

Your job application has been prepared and saved. Please review before sending.

Company:{{ $json.company_name }}
Position:{{ $json.job_title }}
Location:{{ $json.location }}
Applied:{{ $json.applied_date }}
ATS Score:{{ $json.ats_score }}%
Git Status:{{ $json.git_status }}

⚠ Action Required: Review the generated materials in your Obsidian vault, then click the Approve button below to confirm sending.

✓ APPROVE & SEND

Application ID: {{ $json.application_id }} | Vault: {{ $json.vault_path }}
Note: Click APPROVE only after reviewing files in your Obsidian vault.
